transcript: Speaker A: so the project we have uh we are have many problem with the timeline and okay that was me every Monday meeting. I read English, I write emails fine, but the second I have to speak, my brain just freezes. I tried Duolingo, I tried expensive classes, nothing worked. One until I found Loora. It's an AI tutor that actually lets me talk. Look, let me show you. Speaker B: What are you doing? Speaker A: I am working. I have many work today. Speaker B: Why don't you speak to an AI tutor? Speaker A: I'm not sure about an AI tutor. I want someone who can help correct my mistakes. Speaker B: Like I did! Speaker B: Download the Loora app and talk to me everyday and I'll help correct your mistakes! Speaker A: Amazing. I'll add it to my daily routine today.

summary: The ad targets individuals who understand English but struggle to speak it confidently in meetings. The presenter demonstrates how the Loora AI tutor corrects her grammar in real-time during a simulated conversation. The video concludes with a call to download the Loora app for daily practice.
